title: Force GUI Scale
description: This is GUI Scale changing mod. This will allow you to force GUI to change its size regardless of "Force Unicode Font" setting.
body:
# 이 모드는 어떤 모드인가요?
Force GUI Scale 모드는 **"유니코드 강제 사용 글꼴"** 설정을 **켜짐** 설정하였을 때 특정 GUI 비율을 사용하지 못하던 점을 수정하여 강제로 사용 가능하게 만들어줍니다.

Force GUI Scale mode forces you to enable certain GUI ratios when you set the "Force Unicode Font" setting on.
## Required Cloth Config API
[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
## GUI SCALE 3 (Mod on)
![GUI SCALE 3 (Mod on)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb66d0a2afb5ffed6ca1e6b09bcdb58ec7002917.png)
## GUI SCALE 3 (Mod off)
![GUI SCALE 3 (Mod off)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/025f85f4e387cd25c46daa7d50454189fd17687c.png)
